authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.40(b)(28) — Codornices Creek (Alameda Co.)
sources.quotedText: (28) Codornices Creek (Alameda Co.). Closed to all fishing all year.

sources.title: 2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (CDFW booklet)
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 254755, "Codornices Creek", Stream, CA, Alameda Co.
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":254755,"gaz_name":"Codornices Creek","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Alameda","objectid_1":1033470,"isunknowncoords":2}, mouth point (Web Mercator -13615454.1144, 4563614.0767 → 37.88799°N, 122.30971°W). Corrects prior file coordinates (-122.3170, 37.8870), which were roughly 650 m southwest of the actual mouth and appear to have been a guessed estimate rather than a GNIS pull; the corrected point is corroborated by the Wikipedia infobox mouth coordinate for Codornices Creek, 37°53′17″N 122°18′35″W (37.88806°N, 122.30972°W).

parameters.note: Codornices Creek, Alameda County, is closed to all fishing all year, protecting its remnant native steelhead/rainbow trout run.

regulations.humanSummary: Closed to all fishing all year
regulations.verbatimText: Codornices Creek (Alameda Co.). Closed to all fishing all year.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
